name: Scale & Offset
label: Scale & Offset

labels.ja: スケールとオフセット

description:
Adjusts the actor's overall size, position, and rotation in
the scene.

**Model Scale** uses a power-of-2 exponential scale so small
changes produce fine adjustments. **Uniform Height** scales
all actors to a consistent average human height regardless of
their original model proportions — disable this when you want
to preserve the model's intended size. **Ground Offset** moves
the actor up or down relative to the floor.

**Rotation** turns the actor around the Y axis. **Offset X**
and **Offset Z** shift position horizontally. **Snapping**
sets the increment size when dragging the actor in the scene —
zero disables snapping entirely.

Presets include *Uniform Life Size*, *Miniature*, *Giant*,
and *Original*.

values.name: Model Scale
values.label: Model Scale
values.description: Adjust the overall scale of the model. Values are exponential for finer control.

values.name: Ground Offset
values.label: Ground Offset
values.description: Set the vertical offset of the model relative to the ground.

values.name: Uniform Height
values.label: Uniform Height
values.description: Enable to scale the model to an average human height.

values.name: Rotation
values.label: Rotation
values.description: Set the rotation of the model in degrees.

values.name: Offset X
values.label: Offset X
values.description: Adjust the horizontal offset of the model along the X-axis.

values.name: Offset Z
values.label: Offset Z
values.description: Adjust the horizontal offset of the model along the Z-axis.

values.name: Snapping
values.label: Snapping
values.description: Set the snapping increment for drag adjustments. Smaller values allow finer control.
